product_overview: FitnessPro is a web application for gym members and coaches to manage bookings, training programs, and progress tracking. It provides role-based dashboards, session booking, training program management, and weight visualization to streamline member-coach workflows.
core_goals: Provide members with an intuitive dashboard to view upcoming sessions, training progress, and weight trends.
Enable members to browse and book coach availability easily and manage their booked sessions.
Allow coaches to create and assign training programs, manage availability, and monitor member progress.
Persist user data (sessions, programs, weight entries, availability) via REST APIs and present interactive visualizations.
Support role-based navigation and guard authenticated routes while keeping the UI responsive and accessible.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate members and coaches with email/password or test account buttons; route users to role-appropriate dashboards.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field (member@gym.com) -> Fill password input field (123456789) -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See personal training overview
Navigate to /login -> Click Coach test account button to auto-fill credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /coach-dashboard -> See coach overview
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid email -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Do not fill credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Member Dashboard
features.description: Show members upcoming sessions, program progress, countdown timers, and recent weight trends with quick navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See countdown timer for next session -> See list of upcoming sessions -> View training program progress with daily tasks -> Check recent weight entries and progress chart
Navigate to /dashboard (not authenticated) -> Be redirected to /login -> See message prompting user to login
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click quick navigation button to /booking -> Navigate to /booking -> See calendar of available sessions

features.name: Book Coaching Sessions
features.description: Browse a calendar of available slots, filter by date, book sessions with confirmation dialogs, and cancel bookings.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as member -> Navigate to /booking -> View calendar of available sessions -> Filter sessions by date -> Click Book button on available time slot -> Confirm booking in dialog -> See booked sessions list updated
Navigate to /booking (not authenticated) -> Be redirected to /login -> See message prompting user to login
Navigate to /booking -> View calendar of available sessions -> Click Book button on a slot already booked -> See error message indicating slot is not available

features.name: View Training Programs
features.description: Let members view assigned training programs including weekly exercise plans, nutrition guidance, trainer notes, and daily task checklists.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as member -> Navigate to /programs -> View weekly exercise plan -> See nutrition guidelines -> Read trainer guidance notes -> Check daily task checklist -> Toggle task completion status -> See task marked complete
Navigate to /programs -> Toggle task completion status -> API update fails -> See error message and task remains unchanged
Navigate to /programs (not authenticated) -> Be redirected to /login -> See message prompting user to login

features.name: Weight Tracking
features.description: Log weight entries with date and notes, view history and interactive line charts showing progress over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as member -> Navigate to /weight-tracking -> View weight progress line chart -> Click Add new weight entry -> Use date picker to select date -> Enter weight value -> Add optional notes -> Submit new weight entry -> See new entry in history table -> See chart update with new data point

Navigate to /weight-tracking -> Click Add new weight entry -> Use date picker to select date -> Enter invalid weight value (non-numeric) -> Submit new weight entry -> See validation error for weight value
Navigate to /weight-tracking (not authenticated) -> Be redirected to /login -> See message prompting user to login

features.name: Coach Dashboard
features.description: Provide coaches with an overview of member counts, session statistics, active programs, and today's schedule with navigation to management pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as coach -> Navigate to /coach-dashboard -> View total members count -> See completed sessions this week -> Check active programs count -> View today's session schedule -> Navigate to /program-management
Navigate to /coach-dashboard (authenticated as member) -> See unauthorized access message or be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /coach-dashboard -> Click link to /manage-availability -> Navigate to /manage-availability -> See today's availability list

features.name: Manage Training Programs
features.description: Allow coaches to create and manage personalized training programs for members, including nutrition, guidance, weekly plans, and daily tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as coach -> Navigate to /program-management -> View list of existing programs -> Click Create New Program button -> Select member from dropdown -> Enter program title -> Add nutrition guidelines -> Enter trainer guidance -> Add weekly exercise plan by day -> Add daily tasks -> Submit to create program -> See program details in list
Navigate to /program-management -> Click Create New Program button -> Leave required fields blank -> Submit -> See validation errors preventing creation
Navigate to /program-management (not authenticated or not a coach) -> Be redirected to /login or see unauthorized message

features.name: Manage Availability
features.description: Let coaches create and remove available time slots for booking, using date and time pickers and visual indicators for slot state.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate as coach -> Navigate to /manage-availability -> View list of available and booked slots -> Select date with date picker -> Select time with time picker -> Click Add Slot button to create availability -> See visual indicators for booked vs available slots -> See new available slot in list
Navigate to /manage-availability -> Select date and time that overlaps existing slot -> Click Add Slot button -> See conflict error preventing overlapping availability
Navigate to /manage-availability -> Click delete on an available slot -> Confirm deletion -> See slot removed from list

routes.description: User login page with role-based authentication
Member dashboard showing upcoming sessions, program progress, and weight tracking
Book coaching sessions from available time slots
View assigned training programs with exercises and nutrition plans
Track and visualize weight progress over time
Coach dashboard showing member progress and upcoming sessions
Create and manage training programs for members
Manage available time slots for coaching sessions

features.description: Login with email and password credentials for member or coach roles
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Use test account buttons to auto-fill credentials

features.name: Member Dashboard
features.description: View personal training overview including upcoming sessions, program progress, and weight trends
user_interactions: View countdown timer for next session
View training program progress with daily tasks
Check recent weight entries and progress chart
Click quick navigation buttons to other sections

features.name: Book Coaching Sessions
features.description: Browse and book available coaching time slots
user_interactions: Click Book button on available time slot

features.name: View Training Programs
features.description: View detailed training program including exercises, nutrition, and daily tasks

features.name: Weight Tracking
features.description: Log and visualize weight progress over time with charts
user_interactions: Add new weight entry with date picker
View history table of all entries

features.name: Coach Dashboard
features.description: View member progress, session statistics, and upcoming schedule
user_interactions: Navigate to program management or availability management

features.name: Manage Training Programs
features.description: Create and manage personalized training programs for members
user_interactions: Add weekly exercise plan by day
View program details in expandable cards

features.name: Manage Availability
features.description: Create and manage available time slots for coaching sessions

Click Add Slot button to create availability
See visual indicators for booked vs available slots

known_limitations.issue: Authentication uses localStorage only, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Login credentials are validated against hardcoded test accounts, sessions persist in localStorage only

known_limitations.issue: Test accounts have hardcoded credentials in the codebase
known_limitations.impact: Security concern - credentials visible in source code
